mapper.select: SELECT * FROM students WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM students WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT id FROM courses WHERE course_name = #{courseName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (student_name, furigana, nickname, phone_number, mailaddress, region, age, gender, remark, is_deleted) VALUES (#{studentName}, #{furigana}, #{nickname}, #{phoneNumber}, #{mailaddress}, #{region}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{remark}, false)
INSERT INTO students_courses (course_id, student_pk, course_name, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{studentPk}, #{courseName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET student_name = #{studentName}, furigana = #{furigana}, nickname = #{nickname}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, mailaddress = #{mailaddress}, region = #{region}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE students_courses SET course_name = #{courseName} WHERE student_pk = #{studentPk}
UPDATE students SET is_deleted = true WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE students SET is_deleted = false WHERE id = #{id}
